# Crochet Wali

> High-quality, handmade crochet bouquets, personalized embroidery hoops, and custom gifts. Crafted with love in New Delhi, India.

## About Us
Crochet Wali is a premium gifting platform specializing in handmade, bespoke crochet and embroidery products. Our mission is to provide unique, forever-lasting gifts for birthdays, anniversaries, and special occasions. Every piece is meticulously handcrafted in India.

## Our Core Products
- **Crochet Bouquets**: Forever flowers that never wilt. Ideal for anniversaries and Valentine's Day.
- **Custom Embroidery Hoops**: Personalized hoops featuring names, dates, and intricate designs.
- **Keychains & Accessories**: Cute, handmade bag charms and car accessories.
- **Custom Designs**: We accept bespoke requests for completely personalized creations.

## Helpful Links
- [Shop All Products](/shop)
- [Custom Design Requests](/custom-design)
- [About Sana](/about)

## Contact & Socials
- **Location**: Hauz Khas Village, New Delhi, India
- **Support Email**: support@Crochet Wali.live
- **Instagram**: [@Crochet Wali](https://instagram.com/Crochet Wali)
- **Pinterest**: [@Crochet Wali](https://pinterest.com/Crochet Wali)

## Policies
- **Shipping**: Free shipping on qualifying orders within India.
- **Delivery Timeline**: Estimated 4-7 days for standard items. Custom items may take longer.
- **Returns**: Valid for damaged or defective items within 5 days of delivery.
